reproducible_local_facts.message: The artifact digest matched the manifest during local verification.
The local claims file matched the supported MIRROR v0.1 claim structure.

review_prompts.message: Check whether the cautious wording remains aligned with the artifact text before citation.

out_of_scope_questions.message: The local report packet does not establish external authorship or identity.
The local report packet does not make legal or regulatory determinations.
The local report packet does not grade the scholarly quality of the argument.

safe_interpretation: This reviewer report packet organizes deterministic local facts and review prompts for independent re-evaluation; it does not certify completeness, publication readiness, scholarly quality, audit status, or legal/regulatory status.
